GSE205704_reanalysis_figures

Author

Pakorn Sagulkoo

Import the relevant packages and set working path directory

# Attach the packages you will need for the analysis.
library(blaseRtools)
library(blaseRdata)
library(monocle3)
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(fastSave)
library(conflicted)
library(blaseRtemplates)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(lazyData)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
library(knitr)
library(pander)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggtext)
conflicts_prefer(base::setdiff)
# Load module pigz from bash to R
Sys.setenv(PATH = paste("/software/apps/pigz/2.8/bin", Sys.getenv("PATH"), sep = ":"))
system("which pigz")
the_font_size <- 10
theme_set(theme_cowplot(font_size = the_font_size))
# Resolve conflicting function names 
conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("lag", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("rename", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("count", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("rowRanges", "MatrixGenerics")
conflict_prefer("reduce", "purrr")
# Set working path
setwd("/mnt/hp-storage/users/pakorns/scRNAseq/GSE205704/")
getwd()
[1] "/mnt/hp-storage/users/pakorns/scRNAseq/GSE205704"
# Graphical parameters 
heatmap_3_colors <- c("#313695","white","#A50026") # 3 color heatmap

Load the analysed object

# Load the object
load.pigz("cds_main_filtered.rda")
# Create Disease_tissue column in cds
cds_main_adapted <- cds_main_filtered
colData(cds_main_adapted)$disease_tissue <-
  paste0(colData(cds_main_adapted)$disease, " ", colData(cds_main_adapted)$tissue)

# Reordering group factor levels - For following graphing order
cds_main_adapted$disease_tissue <- factor(cds_main_adapted$disease_tissue,
                                  levels = c("CLL PBMC", "RT PBMC", "RT LN"))

colData(cds_main_adapted)$partition_assignment_1 <-
  recode(
    colData(cds_main_adapted)$partition,
    "1" = "B",
    "2" = "B",
    "3" = "B",
    "4" = "T",
    "5" = "T",
    "6" = "Mono",
    "7" = "B",
    "8" = "T",
    "9" = "T",
    "10" = "T",
    "11" = "B"
  )

colData(cds_main_adapted)$f1d_lbl <- paste0(
  colData(cds_main_adapted)$disease_tissue, "-", recode(colData(cds_main_adapted)$patient, "pt_2712" = "Pt 1", "pt_1245" = "Pt 2"))
colData(cds_main_adapted)$patient <- recode(colData(cds_main_adapted)$patient, "pt_2712" = "Pt 1", "pt_1245" = "Pt 2")

Figure 1A

F1AP1 <-
  bb_var_umap(
    filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(patient == "Pt 1")),
    "partition_assignment_1", overwrite_labels = T,
    facet_by = "disease_tissue"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))

F1AP2 <- bb_var_umap(filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(patient == "Pt 1")),
                     "log_local_n",
                     facet_by = "disease_tissue") +
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "Log<sub>10</sub><br>Cells") +
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=9))+
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(0.4,"cm"))+
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())

F1AP3 <- bb_gene_umap(filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(patient == "Pt 1")),
                      gene_or_genes = "PRMT5") +
  facet_wrap( ~ disease_tissue) +
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "*PRMT5*") +
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=9))+
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(0.4,"cm"))+
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())+ 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.2, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))
F1A <- F1AP1/F1AP2/F1AP3
F1A

Figure 1D

F1D0 <- bb_var_umap(filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")),
                    "partition_assignment_1", facet_by = "f1d_lbl", overwrite_labels = T) +
    theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  )+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black"))+ 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))

F1D1<- bb_var_umap(filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")),
                   "density", facet_by = "f1d_lbl") + 
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "*Density*") +
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=9))+
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(0.3,"cm"))+
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())+ 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))

F1D2<- bb_gene_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")), 
  gene_or_genes = c("PRMT5") 
) + facet_wrap(~f1d_lbl)+
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "*PRMT5*") +
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=9))+
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(0.3,"cm"))+
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())+ 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))

F1D3<- bb_gene_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")), 
  gene_or_genes = c("MYC")
) + facet_wrap(~f1d_lbl)+
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "*MYC*") +
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=9))+
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(0.3,"cm"))+
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())+ 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))

F1D4 <- bb_gene_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")), 
  gene_or_genes = c("MKI67")
) + facet_wrap(~f1d_lbl)+
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "*MKI67*") +
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size=8)) +
  theme(legend.key.size = unit(0.3,"cm"))+
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())+ 
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"))

F1D <-
  as_ggplot(grid.arrange(
    patchworkGrob(F1D0 / F1D1 / F1D2 / F1D3 / F1D4),
    left = textGrob(F1D3$labels$y, rot=90, vjust = 1.5, hjust=0.35),
    bottom = textGrob(F1D3$labels$x, hjust = 0.8, vjust = -0.5))
  )
F1D

Supplemental Figure 1F

# Make logical values for PRMT5+MYC+, PRMT5+/MKI67+, and PRMT5+/MYC+/MKI67+ cells
mat <- monocle3::exprs(cds_main_adapted)

PRMT5_tbl <- colnames(mat[ ,mat["ENSG00000100462", ] > 0]) |> as_tibble() |> mutate(prmt5_pos = TRUE) |> rename(cell_id = value)
cds_main_adapted <- bb_tbl_to_coldata(cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = PRMT5_tbl)

MYC_tbl <- colnames(mat[ ,mat["ENSG00000136997", ] > 0]) |> as_tibble() |> mutate(myc_pos = TRUE) |> rename(cell_id = value)
cds_main_adapted <- bb_tbl_to_coldata(cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = MYC_tbl)

MKI67_tbl <- colnames(mat[ ,mat["ENSG00000148773", ] > 0]) |> as_tibble() |> mutate(mki67_pos = TRUE) |> rename(cell_id = value)
cds_main_adapted <- bb_tbl_to_coldata(cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = MKI67_tbl)

colData(cds_main_adapted)$prmt5_myc_pos <- colData(cds_main_adapted)$prmt5_pos & colData(cds_main_adapted)$myc_pos
colData(cds_main_adapted)$prmt5_mki67_pos <- colData(cds_main_adapted)$prmt5_pos & colData(cds_main_adapted)$mki67_pos  
colData(cds_main_adapted)$prmt5_myc_mki67_pos <- colData(cds_main_adapted)$prmt5_pos & colData(cds_main_adapted)$mki67_pos & colData(cds_main_adapted)$myc_pos  

cds_main_adapted <- bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> 
  filter(prmt5_pos) |> 
  select(cell_id) |> 
  mutate(prmt5_label = "PRMT5+ cells") |> 
  bb_tbl_to_coldata(cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = _)
cds_main_adapted <- bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> 
  filter(prmt5_myc_pos) |> 
  select(cell_id) |> 
  mutate(prmt5_myc_label = "PRMT5+/MYC+ cells") |> 
  bb_tbl_to_coldata(cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = _)
cds_main_adapted <- bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> 
  filter(prmt5_mki67_pos) |> 
  select(cell_id) |> 
  mutate(prmt5_mki67_label = "PRMT5+/MKI67+ cells") |> 
  bb_tbl_to_coldata(cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = _)
cds_main_adapted <- bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> 
  filter(prmt5_myc_mki67_pos) |> 
  select(cell_id) |> 
  mutate(prmt5_myc_mki67_label = "PRMT5+/MYC+/MKI67+ cells") |> 
  bb_tbl_to_coldata(cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = _)
S1F1 <-bb_var_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells= bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")),
  "prmt5_label",
  #facet_by = "disease_tissue",
  value_to_highlight = "PRMT5+ cells",
  palette = "#481F70FF", 
  legend_pos = "bottom", 
  foreground_alpha = 0.6
) +
  #theme(axis.text = element_blank()) +
  #theme(axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
  #labs(x = "UMAP 1", y= "UMAP 2") + 
  labs(y=NULL,x=NULL) +theme(legend.position = "right") + 
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"))

S1F2<- bb_var_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells= bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")),
  "prmt5_myc_label",
  #facet_by = "disease_tissue",
  value_to_highlight = "PRMT5+/MYC+ cells",
  palette = "#365D8DFF", 
  legend_pos = "bottom", 
  foreground_alpha = 0.6
) +
  #theme(axis.text = element_blank()) +
  #theme(axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y= "UMAP 2") + labs(y=NULL,x=NULL) +theme(legend.position = "right")+ 
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"))

S1F3<-bb_var_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells= bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")),
  "prmt5_mki67_label",
  #facet_by = "disease_tissue",
  value_to_highlight = "PRMT5+/MKI67+ cells",
  palette = "#21908CFF", 
  legend_pos = "bottom", 
  foreground_alpha = 0.6
) +
  #theme(axis.text = element_blank()) +
  #theme(axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y= "UMAP 2") + labs(y=NULL,x=NULL) +theme(legend.position = "right")+ 
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"))

S1F4<-bb_var_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells= bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")),
  "prmt5_myc_mki67_label",
  #facet_by = "disease_tissue",
  value_to_highlight = "PRMT5+/MYC+/MKI67+ cells",
  palette = "#47C16EFF", 
  legend_pos = "bottom", 
  foreground_alpha = 0.6
) +
  #theme(axis.text = element_blank()) +
  #theme(axis.ticks = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y= "UMAP 2") + labs(y=NULL,x=NULL) +theme(legend.position = "right")+ 
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"))
S1F1/S1F2/S1F3/S1F4

Figure 1E

# Compare to Lit data - Nadeu et al
nadeu_11b <-
  readxl::read_excel(
    "41591_2022_1927_MOESM3_ESM.xlsx",
    sheet = "Supplementary Table 11b",
    skip = 5,
    col_names = c(
      "feature_id",
      "gene_short_name",
      "mean",
      "l2fc",
      "se",
      "p",
      "padj",
      "direction"
    )
  )

cds_main_adapted <- nadeu_11b |> 
  filter(direction == "Up") |> 
  filter(padj < 0.05) |> 
  mutate(feature_id = str_remove(feature_id, "\\..*")) |> 
  mutate(nadeu_RT_gene = TRUE) |> 
  bb_tbl_to_rowdata(obj = cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = _)

cds_main_adapted <- nadeu_11b |>
 filter(direction == "Down") |>
 filter(padj < 0.05) |>
 mutate(feature_id = str_remove(feature_id, "\\..*")) |>
 mutate(nadeu_CLL_gene = TRUE) |>
 bb_tbl_to_rowdata(obj = cds_main_adapted, min_tbl = _)
F1E1 <- bb_gene_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(patient == "Pt 1")),
  gene_or_genes = bb_rowmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> select(feature_id, nadeu_RT_gene)
) +
  facet_wrap( ~ disease_tissue) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "*RT Gene*<br>Expression") +
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())

F1E2 <- bb_gene_umap(
  filter_cds(cds_main_adapted, cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> filter(patient == "Pt 1")),
  gene_or_genes = bb_rowmeta(cds_main_adapted) |> select(feature_id, nadeu_CLL_gene)
) +
  facet_wrap( ~ disease_tissue) +
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(color = "black")) +
  labs(color = "*CLL Gene*<br>Expression") +
  theme(legend.title = ggtext::element_markdown())

F1E <-
  as_ggplot(grid.arrange(
    patchworkGrob(F1E1 / F1E2),
    left = F1E1$labels$y,
    bottom = textGrob(F1E1$labels$x, hjust = 0.85, vjust = -1)
  ))
F1E

Figure 1F

F1F <- bb_var_umap(filter_cds(cds_main_adapted,
                               cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |>
                                 filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN")), "leiden", overwrite_labels = T
  ) + labs(title = "Combined RT LN")

F1F

Figure 1G

# Top markers
LN_B_leiden_Top50_tm <- monocle3::top_markers(
  filter_cds(
    cds_main_adapted,
    cells = bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |>
      filter(disease_tissue == "RT LN") |>
      filter(partition_assignment_1 == "B")),
    group_cells_by = "leiden",
    genes_to_test_per_group = 50,
    cores = 12)

markers <- LN_B_leiden_Top50_tm |> filter(cell_group %in% c("5","10")) |> pull(gene_short_name)
# Subsetting
ln_cds<-cds_main_adapted[,colData(cds_main_adapted)$disease_tissue == "RT LN" &
                   colData(cds_main_adapted)$partition_assignment_1 == "B"]

f1_mat <- bb_aggregate(obj = filter_cds(ln_cds,
                                        cells = bb_cellmeta(ln_cds) |>
                                          filter(leiden %in% c('5','10','3','4','9','1','2')),
                                        genes = bb_rowmeta(ln_cds) |>
                                          filter(gene_short_name %in% markers)),
                       cell_group_df = bb_cellmeta(ln_cds) |>
                         select(cell_id, leiden)) |>
  t() |>
  scale() |>
  t()

rownames(f1_mat) <- tibble(feature_id = rownames(f1_mat)) |>
  left_join(bb_rowmeta(ln_cds) |>
              select(feature_id, gene_short_name)) |>
  pull(gene_short_name)
f1_colfun = circlize::colorRamp2(breaks = c(min(f1_mat),
                                            0,
                                            max(f1_mat)),
                                 colors = heatmap_3_colors)

F1_highlights <- c("CCNA2", "HMGB2", "NPM1", "TUBB", "CDK1", "MKI67", "TUBA1B", "TUBA1C", "TCL1A", "TOP2A", "BIRC5", "JUNB", "UBE2S", "UBE2C", "STMN1", "CKS1B", "MS4A1", "GAPDH", "PFDN5", "BTG1", "UBC", "CD19", "AURKB", "CCR7", "KLF2", "ZFP36", "CD37", "XBP1", "RAC2", "GAS5", "BUB1", "HMMR", "CDKN2A", "ANP32B", "IGHG3", "PLK1", "TPX2", "AURKA")

# Transpose the matrix
f1_mat_t <- t(f1_mat)

# Create new annotation for column (now genes are columns)
f1_col_anno <- ComplexHeatmap::HeatmapAnnotation(
  link = anno_mark(
    at = which(colnames(f1_mat_t) %in% F1_highlights),
    labels = colnames(f1_mat_t)[colnames(f1_mat_t) %in% F1_highlights],
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    padding = unit(4.5, "mm")
  )
)

# Draw the heatmap (now clusters are rows, genes are columns)
F1G <- grid.grabExpr(draw(
  ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(f1_mat_t,
    col = f1_colfun,
    name = "Expression", 
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    top_annotation = f1_col_anno,
    row_dend_side = "left",           # cluster dendrogram on the left
    column_dend_side = "bottom",      # gene dendrogram at the bottom
    column_dend_height = unit(2, "mm"),
    row_dend_width = unit(4, "mm"),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      legend_direction = "vertical",
      title_position = "topleft", 
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6)
    )
  ),
  heatmap_legend_side = "left"  # << Move legend to the left
))
F1FG <- (F1F | F1G) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 2.5))
F1FG

Supplemental Figure 1B

# Cell type annotation (all)
bb_var_umap(cds_main_adapted, "partition_assignment_1", overwrite_labels = T) +
  labs(title = "All cell type annotation")
# Leiden clustering
bb_var_umap(cds_main_adapted, "leiden", overwrite_labels = T) +
  labs(title = "Leiden clustering")
S1B <- bb_genebubbles(
  cds_main_adapted,
  genes = c("CD14","CD4","CD8A", "CD3E", "CD79A", "MS4A1", "CD19"
  ),
  cell_grouping = c("leiden", "partition_assignment_1"),
  return_value = "data"
) |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = leiden, 
                       y = gene_short_name, 
                       color = expression,
                       size = proportion)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_size_area() +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  facet_wrap(~partition_assignment_1, scales = "free_x", ) +
  theme_minimal_grid(font_size = 8) +
  theme(strip.background = ggh4x::element_part_rect(side = "b", colour = "black", fill = "transparent")) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face = "italic")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, size = "Proportion", color = "Expression")
S1B

Supplemental Figure 1G

S1G <- bb_var_umap(cds_main_adapted, "leiden", overwrite_labels = T, facet_by= "disease_tissue")
S1G

Figure 1H: Pseudobulk Volcano

# Leiden_assignment_2 assigned w/S1E & F1E1
colData(cds_main_adapted)$leiden_assignment_2 <-
  recode(
    colData(cds_main_adapted)$leiden,
    "1" = "CLL_B",
    "2" = "CLL_B",
    "3" = "Int_PBMC_B",
    "4" = "Int_LN_B",
    "5" = "RT_B",
    "6" = "T",
    "7" = "T",
    "8" = "T",
    "9" = "Int_LN_B",
    "10" = "RT_B",
    "11" = "T",
    "12" = "T",
    "13" = "T",
    "14" = "Mono",
    "15" = "RT_B",
    "16" = "CLL_B",
    "17" = "T",
    "18" = "T",
    "19" = "B",
    "20" = "T",
    "21" = "T",
    "22" = "B",
    "23" = "T",
    "24" = "B"
  )
exp_design <- 
  bb_cellmeta(cds_main_adapted) |>
  group_by(disease_tissue, leiden_assignment_2) |>
  summarise()
#exp_design

pseudobulk_res <-
  bb_pseudobulk_mf(cds = cds_main_adapted,
                   pseudosample_table = exp_design, 
                   design_formula = "~ leiden_assignment_2",
                   result_recipe = c("leiden_assignment_2", "RT_B", "CLL_B"))
# Differential expression results.
genes_to_highlight <- unique(c("FOSB", "PRMT5","FOXM1", F1_highlights))
genes_to_highlight <- genes_to_highlight[genes_to_highlight %in% (filter(pseudobulk_res$Result, padj < 0.1 & abs(log2FoldChange) >= 0.58)|>pull(gene_short_name))]

volcano_data_RTvCLL <- pseudobulk_res$Result %>%
  mutate(threshold = padj < 0.1 & abs(log2FoldChange) >= 0.58) %>%
  mutate(text_label = ifelse(gene_short_name %in% genes_to_highlight, gene_short_name, ""))
F1H <-
  ggplot(
    volcano_data_RTvCLL,
    aes(
      x = log2FoldChange,
      y = -log10(padj),
      colour = threshold,
      fill = threshold,
      label = text_label
    )
  ) +
  geom_point(shape = 21,
             size = 0.5,
             alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_text_repel(color = "black",
                  fontface = "italic",
                  box.padding = 0.22, #0.5
                  point.padding = 0.1, #0.25
                  min.segment.length = 0,
                  max.overlaps = 20000,
                  size = 3,
                  segment.size = 0.25,
                  force = 2,
                  seed = 1234,
                  segment.curvature = -0.1,
                  segment.square = TRUE,
                  segment.inflect = TRUE) +
  xlab("log<sub>2</sub> fold change") +
  ylab("-log<sub>10</sub> adjusted p-value") +
  theme(axis.title.x =  element_markdown()) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_markdown()) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey80", "#DC0000")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("transparent", "#DC0000")) +
  labs(caption = "\U21D0 Up in CLL\nUp in RT \U21D2",title = "Pseudobulk:RT clusters 5 & 10 vs CLL clusters 1, 2 & 16")+
  theme(plot.caption.position = "panel") +
  theme(plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1.0*max(abs(range(volcano_data_RTvCLL %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(padj)) %>% pull(log2FoldChange)))), 1.0*max(abs(range(volcano_data_RTvCLL %>% filter(!is.na(padj)) %>% pull(log2FoldChange))))))
F1H

GSEA functional enrichment analysis

# Import the related libraries in functional enrichment analysis
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(enrichplot)
library(msigdbr)
# Hallmark set
hs_hm_sets <- read.csv("/mnt/hp-storage/users/pakorns/scRNAseq/GSE201704/GSM6069857/hs_hm_sets.csv")

# GO:BP set
hs_go_sets <- read.csv("/mnt/hp-storage/users/pakorns/scRNAseq/GSE201704/GSM6069857/hs_go_sets.csv")
# Manipulate the expression data
res <- pseudobulk_res[["Result"]]
lfc_vector <- res$log2FoldChange # Create a named vector ranked based on the log2 fold change
names(lfc_vector) <- res$id
lfc_vector <- na.omit(lfc_vector) # Omit any NA values
lfc_vector <- sort(lfc_vector, decreasing = TRUE) # Sort the log2 fold change in descending order

Hallmark

# Run GSEA (Hallmarks)
set.seed(2020)
HM_gse <- GSEA(
  geneList = lfc_vector, # Ordered ranked gene list
  minGSSize = 25, # Minimum gene set size
  maxGSSize = 500, # Maximum gene set set
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05, # p-value cutoff
  eps = 0, # Boundary for calculating the p value
  seed = TRUE, # Set seed to make results reproducible
  pAdjustMethod = "BH", # Benjamini-Hochberg correction
  TERM2GENE = dplyr::select(
    hs_hm_sets,
    gs_name,
    ensembl_gene
  )
)
# Collect the GSEA result
HM_GSEA.result <- HM_gse@result
HM_GSEA.result
[1] ID              Description     setSize         enrichmentScore
[5] NES             pvalue          p.adjust        qvalue         
<0 rows> (or 0-length row.names)
# GSEA plot for HALLMARK_E2F_TARGETS, HALLMARK_MYC_TARGETS_V1, and HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE

E2F_gsea.plt <- gseaplot(HM_gse, 
                          by = "runningScore", 
                          title = "HALLMARK_E2F_TARGETS", 
                          geneSetID = "HALLMARK_E2F_TARGETS",
                          base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1))

Myc_gsea.plt <- gseaplot(HM_gse, 
                          by = "runningScore", 
                          title = "HALLMARK_MYC_TARGETS_V1", 
                          geneSetID = "HALLMARK_MYC_TARGETS_V1",
                          base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1))

InterferonGamma_response_gsea.plt <- gseaplot(HM_gse, 
                          by = "runningScore", 
                          title = "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE", 
                          geneSetID = "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE",
                          base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1))

E2F_gsea.plt + Myc_gsea.plt + InterferonGamma_response_gsea.plt

GO:BP

# GSEA in GO-BP term
set.seed(2020)
GOBP_gsea <- GSEA(
  geneList = lfc_vector, # Ordered ranked gene list
  minGSSize = 25, # Minimum gene set size
  maxGSSize = 500, # Maximum gene set set
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05, # p-value cutoff
  eps = 0, # Boundary for calculating the p value
  seed = TRUE, # Set seed to make results reproducible
  pAdjustMethod = "BH", # Benjamini-Hochberg correction
  TERM2GENE = dplyr::select(
    hs_go_sets,
    gs_name,
    ensembl_gene
  )
)
# Collect the GSEA result
GOBP_GSEA.result <- GOBP_gsea@result
GOBP_GSEA.result %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  select(c(Description, NES, pvalue, p.adjust))
# A tibble: 11 × 4
   Description                                              NES  pvalue p.adjust
   <chr>                                                  <dbl>   <dbl>    <dbl>
 1 GOBP_FC_EPSILON_RECEPTOR_SIGNALING_PATHWAY             -2.43 4.40e-6  0.00988
 2 GOBP_TOLL_LIKE_RECEPTOR_3_SIGNALING_PATHWAY            -2.18 2.37e-5  0.0177 
 3 GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT               1.66 1.79e-5  0.0177 
 4 GOBP_NEGATIVE_REGULATION_OF_T_CELL_RECEPTOR_SIGNALING… -2.17 8.76e-5  0.0291 
 5 GOBP_REGULATION_OF_DENDRITIC_SPINE_DEVELOPMENT          1.51 8.87e-5  0.0291 
 6 GOBP_METANEPHROS_DEVELOPMENT                            1.51 8.99e-5  0.0291 
 7 GOBP_HOMOPHILIC_CELL_ADHESION_VIA_PLASMA_MEMBRANE_ADH…  1.43 9.08e-5  0.0291 
 8 GOBP_TRABECULA_MORPHOGENESIS                            1.60 1.45e-4  0.0317 
 9 GOBP_AXONEME_ASSEMBLY                                   1.43 1.37e-4  0.0317 
10 GOBP_NEURON_PROJECTION_GUIDANCE                         1.32 1.55e-4  0.0317 
11 GOBP_CELL_CELL_ADHESION_VIA_PLASMA_MEMBRANE_ADHESION_…  1.31 1.53e-4  0.0317 
# GSEA plot for GOBP_CELLULAR_RESPONSE_TO_BIOTIC_STIMULUS

cellular_to_biotic_gsea.plt <- gseaplot(GOBP_gsea, 
                          by = "runningScore", 
                          title = "GOBP_CELLULAR_RESPONSE_TO_BIOTIC_STIMULUS", 
                          geneSetID = "GOBP_CELLULAR_RESPONSE_TO_BIOTIC_STIMULUS",
                          base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1))

cellular_to_biotic_gsea.plt
